title: MCP trust monitoring output
description: Per-server trust reports plus the trusted and candidate baseline records that mutating modes persist in the default Key-Value Store.

reports.title: Server trust reports
reports.description: One structured, redacted monitoring report per enabled server in the default Dataset.

trustedBaselines.title: Trusted baselines
trustedBaselines.description: Trusted normalized baseline records created only by an explicitly selected mutating mode or exact candidate promotion.

candidateBaselines.title: Candidate baselines
candidateBaselines.description: Candidate normalized baseline records retained for review until replaced by an ordinary candidate-writing run or consumed by a successful exact-lineage promotion.
